creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 200661
Update x11/libinput to 1.12.4

Hi!
Attached is a patch to update libinput to 1.12.4.
It is rebased on the changes done to the FreeBSD ports tree to update to libinput 1.11.3.  Please help test it.
It is also committed to our development repo, here:
https://github.com/FreeBSDDesktop/freebsd-ports/tree/feature/input-ports
Commit:
https://github.com/FreeBSDDesktop/freebsd-ports/commit/100511ffed6a19dbf767183dc3d5425eb261a30c

Please help out and give it a spin.

Thanks!
-- 
Niclas
